name: Granola
recipeIngredient: 1/2 can to 1 full can thawed frozen apple juice concentrate (12-ounce size)
Optional: 1/4 cup ground psyllium powder, 1 TBSP cinnamon
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together in a big bowl the rolled oats, barley flakes, wheat flakes, and rye flakes.
2. Thaw out the can of apple juice concentrate and pour it undiluted directly over the grains to moisten. This adds sweetness without using sugar or honey.
3. (Optional) In a measuring cup, mix together ground psyllium powder and cinnamon. Sprinkle this mixture over the moistened grains and combine well.
4. Spread the mixture evenly on cookie sheets and place in a preheated 350°F oven.
5. After about 20 minutes, remove the cookie sheets and stir the granola to dry out moisture and lightly toast without burning. Continue stirring every 15 minutes until completely dry and golden brown.
6. Turn down the heat to 300°F for additional drying if needed.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on a counter before transferring back to a bowl. Add about a cup of raisins, mix well, and store in a jar.
